ops.text: STEP 0 COMPLETE + tree surprise. (1) auditor-gold v1 MINTED: exact 200/100/241 hit (salt 'auditor-gold-v1-1539'), 541 rows / 373 distinct dedup_keys / 34 cols, session-atomic, zero cross-split dedup_key overlap, manifest digest 13ddfa2e…, at ~/.cc-steer/experiments/auditor-gold-v1/. Orchestrator rulings on the mint's two flagged interpretations, both ACCEPTED as minted: (a) uniqueness at (dedup_key, auditor_prompt_version) grain is correct — 541 is the planned total, re-judgments at pv3/4/5 are distinct measurement events, leakage is prevented by session atomicity; experiments needing item grain group within splits. (b) triage verdict from latest_judge (canonical pv6) is correct — the κ ladder's question is the CURRENT judge vs auditor; consequence: E30.3 stratifies by auditor_prompt_version (3/4/5) + labeler + fidelity, not triage pv. (2) b998264 VERIFIED on main: 36ca84a5 is ancestor of main 8432281a; real-data repro on the 2026-07-19 nightly parquet (6731→3977→200 val) drops exactly the 2 overlong rows [4253, 4113] tokens with no exception, labels aligned; module tests 62/62. Residual: PyPI release before Sun 07-26 04:00. (3) Infra F built and reviewed (finder/refuter: 1 confirmed minor — leaked docs/assets/.gd-build/fleet-theme.css build artifact; 1 refuted) BUT the local working copy was 24 commits behind main, and main independently added a DIFFERENT cc_steer/stats.py (StatsReport corpus surface). Decision: our DeLong module renames to cc_steer/instrument.py (tests/test_instrument.py, docs section 'Instrument'); main's stats.py keeps the name. Resolution lane running: conflict resolution + rename + venv re-sync (cc-transcript 13.2→14.6) + full pytest + docs build on the merged base, then scoped ship + release.
